overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a circular medieval divination classroom with stone walls, tall gothic windows, and glowing crystal balls on tables. The scene features minimal camera movement as characters move through the warmly lit interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a circular medieval divination classroom as a brief moment of movement disrupts the stillness of the warmly lit space. It begins with a static view of the stone walls and gothic windows, where a robed character stands poised beside a table of glowing crystal balls. As the scene unfolds, a second character enters from the right background and traverses the center of the room, passing beneath the chandelier and across a central rug. The camera remains fixed as the walker continues their path before turning back toward the right window. Finally, the movement ceases and the room settles back into a quiet state, with the crystal balls continuing to glow steadily against the dim stone interior.
